movie.title: Weathering with You (2019) Dual/Multi Audio [Hindi ORG, ENG & Japanese] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: Tokyo is currently experiencing rain showers that seem to disrupt the usual pace of everyone living there to no end. Amidst this seemingly eternal downpour arrives the runaway high school student Hodaka Morishima, who struggles to financially support himself—ending up with a job at a small-time publisher. At the same time, the orphaned Hina Amano also strives to find work to sustain herself and her younger brother.
